Validation Rule: Every architecture object must have stable ID owner lifecycle state and related governance object where applicable
Notes: Exact table names should be confirmed against licensed ServiceNow EA module configuration

Validation Rule: Applications must map to at least one business capability and one accountable owner
Notes: Use APM as authoritative application portfolio source

Validation Rule: Capabilities must support hierarchy and relationship mapping
Notes: Align with BIAN where banking-domain appropriate

Validation Rule: Business services must map to capabilities and supporting technical services
Notes: CSDM relationship quality is a governance metric

Validation Rule: Technical services must have support owner and CI relationship
Notes: Do not create orphan technical services

Validation Rule: CI must have authoritative discovery/source and relationship to service where applicable
Notes: EA defines intent Ops executes CMDB maintenance

Validation Rule: Requirement must map to at least one control or documented rationale
Control must map to requirement and evidence source
Notes: IRM may be ServiceNow or Archer depending final operating design

Validation Rule: Evidence must be time-bound owner-attested and reviewable
Notes: Evidence without control mapping is not governance evidence

Validation Rule: No exception or waiver may be open-ended
Notes: Monthly review required for high-risk exceptions

Validation Rule: Material change decisions must be captured before implementation
Notes: ARB is approval gate not advisory theater
